name: Drive Now - Van Buren
description_short: Drive Now - Van Buren is a used car dealership in Phoenix offering buy-here-pay-here auto financing for customers with less than perfect credit.
description_long:
Drive Now - Van Buren is a used car dealership located at 2201 W Van Buren Street in Phoenix, Arizona, operating under the Brijay Automotive Group. The dealership specializes in serving the Phoenix area with a focus on used vehicle sales and alternative auto financing solutions. The company positions itself as a neighborhood-accessible option, situated near I-17 and local parks and public buildings in the Van Buren corridor.

Drive Now offers a buy-here-pay-here auto financing program designed specifically for customers with less than perfect credit. Their services include vehicle sales (used cars, trucks, SUVs, and minivans), pre-approval inquiries through an online form, and financing consultation. The dealership emphasizes competitive pricing, large inventory selection, and customer service as core differentiators. They operate extended hours Monday through Saturday (9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-6pm Saturday) to accommodate working customers.

The company distinguishes itself through its explicit targeting of subprime borrowers and implementation of a buy-here-pay-here model, which typically involves regular payment collection and vehicle GPS/starter interrupt devices. Their online pre-approval form allows customers to assess financing eligibility before visiting the lot. The dealership's location near amenities and public transit corridors in Phoenix makes it accessible to a broad customer base across the metropolitan area.

Drive Now operates in the used car financing space, a sector with inherent risks for consumers including potential high interest rates, mechanical issues with older vehicles, and aggressive collection practices common to buy-here-pay-here operators. While the website does not disclose specific APR rates, terms, or payment structures, the buy-here-pay-here model typically involves significantly higher costs than traditional auto financing. Consumers should carefully review all loan documents and vehicle conditions before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Accepts customers with less than perfect credit explicitly
Buy-here-pay-here financing option available in-house without third-party lender
Extended business hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-6pm Saturday) for working customers
Large inventory of used cars, trucks, SUVs, and minivans to choose from
Online pre-approval form allows customers to check eligibility before visiting
Convenient location near I-17 and multiple Phoenix neighborhoods
Direct sales contact (602-345-8001) and physical dealership for consultation
cons: No APR rates, payment terms, or financing details disclosed on website
Buy-here-pay-here model typically involves higher total costs and payment collection practices
Used vehicles carry inherent mechanical and title risk not addressed in marketing
No information about warranty, vehicle inspection standards, or buyer protections
SMS communication from 'Brijay Automotive Group and affiliated brands' suggests data sharing practices
best_for: Consumers with poor or fair credit seeking to purchase a used vehicle
Phoenix-area buyers who need convenient same-day or quick financing decisions
Customers who prefer in-house financing over traditional lenders or credit unions
diagnosis: Drive Now - Van Buren is best for Phoenix-area consumers with poor credit who need immediate vehicle financing and are willing to accept the higher costs associated with buy-here-pay-here lending. The primary caveat is that APR rates and true total costs are not disclosed online, and buy-here-pay-here programs typically involve significantly higher interest rates, payment collection practices, and device installations compared to traditional auto financing—consumers must review complete loan terms before purchasing.
services: Used car sales (cars, trucks, SUVs, minivans)
Online pre-approval forms for credit assessment
In-person financing consultation with sales associates
Financing for customers with less than perfect credit
Extended operating hours for customer convenience
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
